'''ât-n-s''' ('''katanas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:easify|easify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:easify|easify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-n-s
|-
! Lemma
| katanas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitanas|thitanas]] || [[word:jitanas|jitanas]] || [[word:shitanas|shitanas]] || [[word:kitanas|kitanas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutanas|thuthutanas]] || [[word:jujutanas|jujutanas]] || [[word:shushutanas|shushutanas]] || [[word:kukutanas|kukutanas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutanas|thutanas]] || [[word:jutanas|jutanas]] || [[word:shutanas|shutanas]] || [[word:kutanas|kutanas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutanas|thutanas]] || [[word:jutanas|jutanas]] || [[word:shutanas|shutanas]] || [[word:kutanas|kutanas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetanas|thetanas]] || [[word:jetanas|jetanas]] || [[word:shetanas|shetanas]] || [[word:ketanas|ketanas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotanas|thothotanas]] || [[word:jojotanas|jojotanas]] || [[word:shoshotanas|shoshotanas]] || [[word:kokotanas|kokotanas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotanas|thotanas]] || [[word:jotanas|jotanas]] || [[word:shotanas|shotanas]] || [[word:kotanas|kotanas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotanas|thotanas]] || [[word:jotanas|jotanas]] || [[word:shotanas|shotanas]] || [[word:kotanas|kotanas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtanas|thĂŠtanas]] || [[word:jĂŠtanas|jĂŠtanas]] || [[word:shĂŠtanas|shĂŠtanas]] || [[word:kĂŠtanas|kĂŠtanas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatanas|thathatanas]] || [[word:jajatanas|jajatanas]] || [[word:shashatanas|shashatanas]] || [[word:kakatanas|kakatanas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatanas|thatanas]] || [[word:jatanas|jatanas]] || [[word:shatanas|shatanas]] || [[word:katanas|katanas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatanas|thatanas]] || [[word:jatanas|jatanas]] || [[word:shatanas|shatanas]] || [[word:katanas|katanas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatanas|shatanas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatanas|goshatanas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatanas|gokishatanas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatanasnĂŒ|shatanasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatanasnknĂŒ|goshatanasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatanasnĂŒ|gokishatanasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatanashĂ«|shatanashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatanasnkshĂ«|goshatanasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatanashĂ«|gokishatanashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatanasro|shatanasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatanasnkro|goshatanasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatanasro|gokishatanasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatanasmu|shatanasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatanasnkmu|goshatanasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatanasmu|gokishatanasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatanasher|shatanasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatanasnksher|goshatanasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatanasher|gokishatanasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatanasng|shatanasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatanasnkng|goshatanasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatanasng|gokishatanasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatanasya|shatanasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatanasnkya|goshatanasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatanasya|gokishatanasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatanasyam|shatanasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatanasnkyam|goshatanasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatanasyam|gokishatanasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatanasnĂŒshĂ«|shatanasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatanasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatanasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatanasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatanasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatanasnĂŒro|shatanasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatanasnknĂŒro|goshatanasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatanasnĂŒro|gokishatanasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatanasnĂŒmu|shatanasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatanasnknĂŒmu|goshatanasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatanasnĂŒmu|gokishatanasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatanashĂ«nĂŒ|shatanashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatanasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatanasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatanashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatanashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatanashĂ«ro|shatanashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatanasnkshĂ«ro|goshatanasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatanashĂ«ro|gokishatanashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatanashĂ«mu|shatanashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatanasnkshĂ«mu|goshatanasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatanashĂ«mu|gokishatanashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatanasronĂŒ|shatanasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatanasnkronĂŒ|goshatanasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatanasronĂŒ|gokishatanasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatanasroshĂ«|shatanasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatanasnkroshĂ«|goshatanasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatanasroshĂ«|gokishatanasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatanasromu|shatanasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatanasnkromu|goshatanasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatanasromu|gokishatanasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatanasmunĂŒ|shatanasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatanasnkmunĂŒ|goshatanasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatanasmunĂŒ|gokishatanasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatanasmushĂ«|shatanasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatanasnkmushĂ«|goshatanasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatanasmushĂ«|gokishatanasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatanasmuro|shatanasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatanasnkmuro|goshatanasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatanasmuro|gokishatanasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
